evals.prompt: I have a new GitHub repo called 'payments-api'. Set it up for Scrum: create all the required labels (type, priority, size, status namespaces), create Sprint 1 milestone lasting 2 weeks, and show me the commands to run.
evals.expected_output: Complete gh CLI commands to: (1) create all labels in all 4 namespaces with GH_PAGER=cat, proper colors, and descriptions, (2) create Sprint 1 milestone via gh api with due_on in ISO 8601 format, (3) include cross-platform date generation or clear placeholder

assertions.text: Includes GH_PAGER=cat before gh commands to prevent output paging
Creates type:* labels (at minimum: type:feature, type:bug, type:chore, type:spike)
Creates priority:* labels (at minimum: priority:critical, priority:high, priority:medium, priority:low)
Creates size:* labels (at minimum: size:xs, size:s, size:m, size:l, size:xl)
Creates status:* labels (at minimum: status:ready, status:in-progress, status:blocked, status:review)
Creates Sprint 1 milestone using gh api repos/{owner}/{repo}/milestones --method POST (not gh milestone create)

evals.prompt: It's mid-sprint on Sprint 2. A production outage just happened — I need to add an urgent bug ticket for 'Payment gateway timeout under load', mark it high priority, assign it to Sprint 2, and figure out if I need to remove a lower-priority item to keep capacity. Show me the gh CLI commands.
evals.expected_output: Commands to: (1) create urgent bug issue with correct labels (type:bug, priority:critical or high, status:in-progress), (2) assign to Sprint 2 milestone, (3) list current sprint issues with size labels for capacity review, (4) suggest moving a lower-priority item out via --milestone ''

assertions.text: Creates issue with gh issue create including --label flags for type:bug and priority:critical or priority:high
Assigns the new issue to Sprint 2 milestone (using --milestone 'Sprint 2', --milestone <number>, or equivalent)
Lists current Sprint 2 issues (open) to assess capacity impact
Shows how to remove an item from sprint using --milestone '' or equivalent gh CLI command
Uses only gh CLI commands — does not suggest using the GitHub UI

evals.prompt: Sprint 3 just ended. Help me: (1) move unfinished issues to Sprint 4, (2) create a retrospective issue, (3) publish GitHub release v0.3.0, and (4) create Sprint 4 milestone. Show me all the gh CLI commands.
evals.expected_output: Commands to: (1) list open Sprint 3 issues and remove milestone assignment, (2) create Sprint 4 milestone with due date, (3) assign carryover issues to Sprint 4, (4) create retrospective issue using gh issue create, (5) gh release create with proper syntax

assertions.text: Lists open issues in Sprint 3 to identify carryover candidates
Creates Sprint 4 milestone via gh api with POST method and due_on field
Shows how to reassign carryover issues to Sprint 4 (--milestone 'Sprint 4')
Creates a retrospective issue with gh issue create including relevant labels
Uses 'gh release create v0.3.0' with --title and --notes or --generate-notes flags
Steps are in logical order: carryover handling → retro → release → next sprint setup
